general.dev_desc: I build robust, scalable backend systems using PHP Laravel and MySQL. Passionate about clean architecture, real-time communication, and bridging software with network infrastructure.
general.sec_desc: Aspiring SOC Tier-1 Analyst & Incident Response Engineer. Training through DEPI, TryHackMe SOC Path, and LetsDefend with hands-on labs in threat detection and SIEM tools.
general.about_dev: I am a computer science student with a strong passion for backend systems, network infrastructure, and building scalable applications. My journey started with C++ and problem-solving, which quickly evolved into building complex real-time applications using PHP and Laravel. I love deep diving into how things work under the hood — from setting up local environments to managing enterprise network configurations.
general.about_sec: Currently training on TryHackMe SOC Level 1 and LetsDefend, with hands-on experience in SIEM tools, network traffic analysis with Wireshark, and structured incident handling workflows

projects.title: Real-Time WebSocket Server (PHP)
projects.description: Full bi-directional real-time communication system built in pure PHP using the Ratchet WebSocket library.

projects.title: Admin Control Panel
projects.description: Full-featured admin dashboard built with PHP and MySQL. Includes user management, data visualization, system controls, and role-based access.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: Dual-mode interactive portfolio showcasing both backend development and cybersecurity skills.

projects.title: SOC Investigation Lab
projects.description: Detected and analyzed suspicious activity from simulated SIEM logs. Documented findings with a full incident timeline.

projects.title: Web Vulnerability Assessment
projects.description: Performed comprehensive vulnerability scans using Nmap and Nessus on a controlled lab environment.

projects.title: Incident Response Report (DEPI Lab)
projects.description: Created a detailed IR report based on a DEPI lab scenario. Covered detection methodology, containment and eradication steps.

highlights: Assisted in setup, configuration, and maintenance of the company's LAN network infrastructure
Diagnosed and resolved network connectivity issues across multiple departments
Prepared technical reports and network topology documentation
Building real-world projects using PHP Laravel and MySQL to solidify backend skills
Implemented a WebSocket-based real-time communication system from scratch
Developed a full admin control panel with authentication and CRUD operations
Specialized training in SOC operations, digital forensics, and structured incident handling
Hands-on labs using SIEM tools for threat detection and log correlation
Actively progressing through the TryHackMe SOC Level 1 learning path
Completed labs on network traffic analysis, SIEM fundamentals, and phishing investigation
